notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the git SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.8. It addresses 5 CVEs: CVE-2024-32002, CVE-2024-32004, CVE-2024-32020, CVE-2024-32021, CVE-2024-32465.
notes.title: Description
